strengths: Neutral dominant: exceptional fireballs, fast walk speed, far-reaching pokes
Relentless pressure with multiple ways to stay plus on block
Massive damage output — one or two touches can end rounds
Versatile vortex toolkit with cross-ups and multi-directional projectiles
weaknesses: Only 9,000 HP — every mistake is far more costly than for the rest of the cast
Limited defensive options; relies entirely on aggressive play
High execution ceiling — success depends heavily on matchup knowledge

strengths: Electric Thunder acts as a full-body counter against normals
Blanka-Chan Bomb creates unpredictable, hard-to-react mixups
Strong mid-range control with long normals and great mobility
weaknesses: Prone to whiffing; long recovery frames punished by experienced players
Gimmick-reliant at higher levels of play
Charge inputs make defensive posture predictable

strengths: Among the fastest walk and dash speeds in the game
Exceptional whiff-punish range with Spiral Arrow from 3/4 screen
Varied offense: dive kicks, Cannon Strike cross-ups, tight frame traps
weaknesses: Mixup tools count as two hits for scaling, reducing combo damage
Linear approach can be read by experienced opponents
Cannon Spike anti-air hitbox nerfed — more vulnerable to jump-ins

strengths: Fastest and longest normals in the game — dominates mid-range footsies
Excellent Drive Rush synergy turns small openings into big combos
Serenity Stream stance extends pressure with additional mixup options
Natural air superiority: can throw or use Lightning Legs while jumping
weaknesses: High execution ceiling with charge inputs and complex combo routes
No invincible reversal — relies on careful Drive Gauge management
Long combo sequences required for optimal damage

strengths: Highly versatile — effective at both zoning and rushdown
Strong mixup game with solid combo routes at multiple distances
Few truly bad matchups; reliable and consistent in neutral
weaknesses: Heavy damage scaling on many BnB starters reduces overall output
Jack-of-all-trades — outperformed by specialists in their preferred range
Can struggle when opponents bypass zoning and force close-range exchanges

strengths: Unmatched range with stretchy-limb normals controlling large screen areas
Yoga Fire projectiles flexible on ground and in air
Yoga Teleport allows surprising repositioning on both axes
weaknesses: Considered the hardest character to master in SF6
Slower movement; mistakes are very costly against aggressive opponents
Extremely vulnerable at close range with limited defensive options

strengths: Sumo Headbutt and Oicho Throw are extremely difficult to deal with at mid levels
Dangerous command throw and forward-moving specials make him hard to keep out
10,500 HP gives more room for mistakes than most of the cast
weaknesses: Kit relies on a small set of gimmicks that weaken at high level
Moveset is highly readable; experienced players know every counter
Struggles against dedicated zoners who nullify his approach tools

strengths: Strong combo routes that abuse the SF6 resource economy
Well-rounded kit with no obvious glaring weakness
Consistent offense with charged attacks and strong neutral
weaknesses: No overhead — offense is more predictable against opponents blocking low
Short punch range requires careful spacing
Susceptible to Drive Impact when mispositioned

strengths: Deceptive high/low mixups and excellent safe-jump options
Lynx Song makes her immune to projectiles while advancing forward
Great range on medium attacks into target combos cancelling into specials
Scratch Wheel is a fully invincible anti-air
weaknesses: Damage output is not the highest — relies on sustained pressure
Healing limited to Super Arts only, reducing self-sustain
Meteor Volley (SA1) is not invincible — can't be used as a reversal

strengths: Sonic Boom: best projectile in the game with variable speed and just-frame version
Flash Kick: devastating anti-air with reliable invincibility frames
More close-combat options than most zoners — viable hybrid strategy
weaknesses: Being cornered removes his entire gameplan
Slow walk speed and charge inputs exploited by mobile characters
Limited poke range outside of Sonic Boom dependency

strengths: At max drink level (4), one of the most threatening rushdown characters
Highly unpredictable movement and high/low mixups at close range
Luminous Dive Kick is one of the hardest-hitting dive kicks in SF history
weaknesses: Starts at base level (0 drinks) with 90% damage scaling — weak early round
Must invest time to drink; opponents can actively prevent it with pressure
Hard-countered by long-range zoners who deny the space to build levels

strengths: Unmatched long-range threat with psycho-power projectiles
Unique full-screen command grab (Embrace) — unique in the entire cast
Zoning optimization potential is among the best in SF6
weaknesses: Essentially helpless at close range if opponents close in
Not agile — difficult to escape once pressure bypasses his zoning layer
Embrace countered by projectiles; high risk when misread

strengths: Standing MP is the only +2 on block normal in the entire game
Powered-up Fuhajin stocks create unique pressure with increased damage
Strong in all phases: rushdown, anti-air, and combo extensions
weaknesses: Reliance on Fuhajin stocks makes offense predictable at high level
Depleted stocks significantly reduce her threat level mid-combo
Somewhat linear gameplan once stocks are read and denied

strengths: Dragonlash Kick and Jinrai Kicks are extremely difficult for opponents to deal with
Complete toolkit: strong normals, good fireballs, excellent combo potential
Best close-range options of the shoto archetype
weaknesses: Shoryuken and specials are punishable on block
Primary combo starters become reactable if overused at high level

strengths: Exceptional mobility with multiple unpredictable approach angles
Shuriken Bomb forces opponent reactions and enables unique combo extensions
Devastating offensive pressure especially in the corner
weaknesses: Stubby normals — must take risks to close distance
No invincible reversal — vulnerable on wake-up
Many strong moves have long startup reactable at high level

strengths: War-club normals give better range than her size suggests
Forward-moving specials set up the powerful Mexican Typhoon command throw
Condor Wind buff enhances specials and provides additional approach options
weaknesses: Condor Dive is punishable on block
Struggles against strong zoners at full screen
Still developing an optimal competitive meta gameplan

strengths: Effective at any range with a great, complete kit
Strong mix of zoning, rushdown, and anti-air tools
High accessibility — reliable at multiple skill levels
weaknesses: Heavy nerfs in Season 2 reduced his previous dominance
Specialists in zoning or grappling outperform him in their preferred range

strengths: Dominant neutral with long-reaching normals that chip Drive Gauge on block
Psycho Mine enables massive frame advantage and devastating combo damage
Fast walk speed and great plus frames let him bully opponents steadily
Does unbelievable Drive Gauge damage, forcing Burnout reliably
weaknesses: No invincible OD reversal — vulnerable to meaty pressure
Poor defense overall when not controlling the pace
Reliant on Psycho Mine setup to reach maximum damage potential

strengths: Excellent poking tools: 5MP and 5HP both have great range and are cancellable
High mobility with aerial options and flexible fan-based projectiles
Kagero no Mai (SA1) powers her up into a damage-pumping machine
weaknesses: Normal Kachousen outclassed by dedicated zoners in neutral
Requires Super Art investment to reach highest damage ceiling
Needs setup investment to maximize her threat level

strengths: At medal level 5, command throw deals ~2,960 damage — surpasses Zangief
Strong legwork with Rond-point (anti-air), Dégagé, and Renversé
Escalating threat level across the match rewards consistent close-range play
weaknesses: Weak neutral game — over-reliance on medals is inconsistent at high level
Hard-countered by long-range characters (JP, Dhalsim) who deny medal stacking
Constant risk of taking heavy punishment when denied close range

strengths: Unparalleled damage output — one or two touches ends rounds
Armor on many attacks lets her power through opponent strikes
10,500 HP means she wins health-for-health trades better than almost anyone
weaknesses: Struggles heavily against zoning playstyles at full screen
Slow movement and predictable approach make her easier to keep out
Simple gameplan plateaus against experienced players who deny grabs

strengths: Unique double jump baits anti-airs and changes landing distance unpredictably
Wind mechanic creates tornadoes that enhance abilities when passed through
Snowball potential is extremely high once momentum builds
Exceptional in both offense and defense
weaknesses: No longer builds SA meter during SA2, affecting resource economy
High mobility becomes predictable when opponents learn double-jump timings
Requires strong matchup knowledge and execution to reach full potential

strengths: Iconic all-rounder with tools for every situation
Denjin Charge adds strategic flexibility to the fireball game
Tatsumaki dodges projectiles while advancing forward
weaknesses: Moves easy to read at high level; heavy punish on blocked Shoryuken
Denjin Charge animation leaves him fully vulnerable to attacks
Historically lags behind Ken and Luke competitively

strengths: Exceptional all-rounder with strong close-range buttons and privileged jump-ins
Power Wave and Round Wave go under most projectiles in the game
Substantial damage via Special Attacks and Super Arts
weaknesses: No normal that is plus on block — limited ability to maintain pressure
Limited mixup options; gameplan can feel straightforward at high level
Light Power Wave has 35 frames of recovery — vulnerable to jump-ins if mistimed

strengths: All grabs including SPD deal enormous damage — one command throw swings rounds
Giga-buffed in recent patches: improved neutral, combo routes, and damage
Double Lariat dodges fireballs; Siberian Express closes distance quickly
Highest HP (11,000) combined with huge damage wins wars of attrition
weaknesses: Pure command-grab gameplan struggles heavily against strong zoners
Drive Gauge burns fast — prone to Burnout vulnerability
Must play very patiently against good keepaway characters (Guile, JP, Dhalsim)
